Interface IXMLSerializeData2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.esriSystem
Assembly
ESRI.Server.System.dll

Provides access to members that serialize and deserialize data from XML.

[Guid("E9A0F087-F1F7-455B-9489-FF34E16B9CC7")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IXMLSerializeData2 : IXMLSerializeData
